creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 161598
Patch to update and improve related ports devel/etl, devel/synfig & graphics/synfigstudio

This updated version of the patch also updates the ports as follows:
devel/etl: Update from 0.04.18 to 0.04.19
devel/synfig: Update from 1.0 to 1.0.1
graphics/synfigstudio: Update from 1.0 to 1.0.1
